approval: Proceed to USB C3E exact isolated installation under the reviewed C3D transaction and rollback boundaries.
scope: Continue the same exact approved C3E transaction by evidence-bound resume of the preserved staging target, full portable-runtime verification, and commit by same-volume rename only after every pre-commit gate passes.
forbidden: modifying the protected Desktop or Core runtimes
modifying ComfyUI source, models, inputs, outputs, custom nodes, System files, or launchers
launching FOXAI, WebUI, Desktop, or ComfyUI
overwriting or merging into a pre-existing final target
automatic deletion of a failed staging or committed target
r1_interpretation: The approved final target is Runtime/ComfyUI/site-packages; creating its absent Runtime/ComfyUI parent is a necessary and narrowly bounded part of that approved transaction.
r2_interpretation: The preserved staging target is the exact uncommitted output of the already approved offline installation. R2 may verify and continue that transaction without reinstalling or broadening the target, network, launcher, or rollback boundaries.
